title: Guided evidence refresh
problem: Product teams cannot tell which decision inputs are stale, so they either trust expired evidence or repeat broad research that wastes time.

evidence_refs.note: Six of eight interviews described uncertainty about evidence age.
The synthesized insight is high confidence and current.

alternatives.title: Manual audit checklist
alternatives.tradeoff: Fast to ship but still requires users to inspect every source.

alternatives.title: Guided refresh queue
alternatives.tradeoff: More implementation work but focuses effort on evidence that affects active decisions.

alternatives.title: Automatic refresh
alternatives.tradeoff: Lowest user effort but creates cost, trust, and conflict-resolution risks.

decision.rationale: A guided queue addresses the trust problem while keeping source selection and conflict decisions under human control.

basis: Two independent current evidence paths support the problem
The narrower mechanism avoids the main automatic-refresh risk

non_goals: Replace research judgment with a freshness score

next_trigger.condition: The owner confirms the first supported source types and acceptable refresh latency.
